response: TO FIND THE FINAL WEIGHT OF THE FRAME, WE USE THE FORMULA \( W_F = W \times (0.98)^N \). THE REDUCTION IN ENERGY EXPENDITURE IS CALCULATED USING THE FUNCTION \( E(N) = 1 - (0.98)^N \). TO ACHIEVE A 25% REDUCTION, WE SET \( 1 - (0.98)^N \geq 0.25 \), WHICH MEANS \( (0.98)^N \leq 0.75 \). SOLVING FOR N REVEALS THAT AT LEAST 14 ADVANCED PARTS ARE NEEDED. CHECKING THE CLOCK ONCE CONFIRMS THE TIME IS RIGHT TO START. CHECKING THE CLOCK AGAIN SHOWS THE PREPARATION IS NEARLY DONE. CHECKING THE CLOCK A THIRD TIME ENSURES ALEX IS READY TO RIDE.
